DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2002 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David J. Foran, Esq., specially appearing for Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq., 415-775-0891, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Vallejo Street Company. Defendant and moving party Ronald Browning appeared in propria persona.

The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the Court: Ronald Browning's Demurrer is overruled with five days leave to answer. Order signed in open court. Honorable Paul H. Alvarado Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR 5220
